title: How to integrate a PTO Board into project calendars
excerpt: I have created a PTO calendar for our company in Monday.com and wanted to see if anyone has any suggestions on how to integrate that information into project boards so PMs can see when anyone on their team will be out ba…

posts.author: Somnio (Somnio)
posts.cookedHtml: I have created a PTO calendar for our company in Monday.com and wanted to see if anyone has any suggestions on how to integrate that information into project boards so PMs can see when anyone on their team will be out based on the PTO calendar. Each project board has a calendar but I am not sure how to integrate that directly into the project calendar?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Somnio,

You might want to check out this post.
We are releasing an app that does what you are looking for and we are currently providing early access
